a.xlink:title: Evaluate an expression of the form: [+ | -]? [var[op]val | [op]var | val | var] ...
Initializes the item according to classname.
Returns list of classnames to replace a map item with.
Returns a random classname of the item.
Returns a random classname of the instagib item.
Returns a random classname of the overkill item.
Returns a random classname of the vanilla item.
Returns a random classname of the item with specific property.
